name: Shimada Death
description: Shimada Death is an ominous living phantom that consumes death, a mysterious creature born from the world of Darkness, known as the God of Death. Shimada met Zaha as a child and understood there will be a lot of death happening around him due to his curse, which means free meals for him. Since he was uninterested in Zaha's bones, he left a positive impression on him and they became friends. When Zaha's spaceship was ready, they started traveling together. description: __Height:__ 175 cm __Estimated Prison Sentence:__ 432 years The Doctor is a mad scientist who toys with people's lives for fun. She has a calm demeanor and speaks philosophically. She has a habit of messing with her nails, and her favorite foods are wine and cheese.

name: Kaiou Retsu
description: Chinese Kung-Fu (referred to as "Kenpo" in Japanese) practitioner. Trained in China and became the heir to his Kung Fu style in his temple. name: Koga
description: The young leader of a yōrōzoku (yōkai-wolf tribe), Kōga wishes to avenge his fallen comrades who were slaughtered by Kagura, one of Naraku's minions. While brash and arrogant, he is shrewd enough to run from a fight if he thinks he can't win. He has a shikon shard in each of his legs which make him stronger and faster. Although he bickers with InuYasha constantly, when one of them is in danger, the other will lend a hand. He considers Kagome his woman, which irritates InuYasha to no end. Koga co

name: Ninja Ninja
description: The white haired companion of Afro Samurai. Afro's herald, hype-man and a real trash-talker; Ninja Ninja bears witness to Afro Samurai's search for Justice. Ninja Ninja is a force of nature - mischievous, highly-strung and dangerously irresponsible. When something is going down he'll split as fast as his veneer of cool. name: Shiho Sawaragi
description: A solemn female student that is respected by her classmates for her hard working and serious nature. She participated in Tomodachi Game alongside her friends.

name: Tsubomi Hanasaki
description: She is a second-year transfer student at Myoudou Academy and is in the same class as [Erika](https://anilist.co/character/29699/Kurumi-Erika). Tsubomi's alter ego is Cure Blossom. Tsubomi is a shy and timid introvert who usually keeps to herself, hesitant to speak openly unless approached first. She often worries over small things and is easily worked up, especially when scared or trying to handle more energetic people like Erika. name: Yuki-onna
description: She has an appearance of a very beautiful woman with a smooth, white complexion, fitting her Snowy profile. She has long hair with a mix color of black and white. She often wears a white kimono. She really cares about [Masayuki Muroi](https://anilist.co/character/266166), who she thinks is too kind for a human.

description: __Height:__ 163 cm (5'3") __Class:__ 3rd Year ~!A 3rd year student who stands out due to her red hair. The main female protagonist is an alien come to Earth who acts to save Kaito from the injuries he sustains when her ship crash-lands. Being an alien unaccustomed to life on Earth, her actions may seem weird in the eyes of others, but she is quick to correct herself, if only to hide the fact that she's an alien. name: Izumi Sakurai
description: A young, shy, and easily frightened teacher. She tries to enforce the school rules to the students albeit unsuccessfully.

name: Lala Hagoromo
description: A humanoid alien from the Planet Saman. She ends her sentences with "~lun" (「～ルン」) and her catchphrase is "Oyo~" (オヨ～). Lala is a serious girl who is treated like an adult back at home. She has a strong sense of responsibility, but sometimes makes mistakes. She has the skills for operating complicated tasks. Initially, Lala comes across as stubborn and insists that analysis should be considered before taking action.

description: Malleus Draconia is a third-year student and the head of Diasomnia. He is a descendant of the fairies, and his magic power is among the strongest in the world. Mitsuha is an intelligent person. She uses her intelligence to solve her and others' problems, with answers and solutions unbefitting of her age, to others' surprise, as they still think Mitsuha is very young with Mitsuha's short stature. name: Momoyo Kawakami
description: **Height:** 173 cm As the oldest member of the Kazama Family, Momoyo is seen as the older sister of the group. She also has a brother-sister type of relationship with Yamato. As such, she'll occasionally pick on him, while also go out of her way to look out for him. Momoyo is considered to be the strongest fighter in the world, second only to her grandfather. She is friends and rivals with Kuki Ageha from KimiAru.

name: Moroha
description: Moroha is the only daughter of Inuyasha and Kagome Higurashi, a quarter-demon bounty hunter who slays demons and sells their parts to other demon slayers, presumably so they can make weapons and armor out of them.

name: Nagisa Akutsu
description: __Year:__ 2nd Year __Jersey Number:__ 4 __Position:__ Defender He is the only player from the class one year above Ashito to have passed the tryouts. A defender with the skill to earn a starting spot on the first team as early as his freshman year, he is stoic and hot-tempered, often clashing with his teammates. He took a dislike to Ashito after facing him during the tryouts, and even after joining the team, he picks fights with him at every opportunity, trying to take him down.

name: Ango Sakaguchi
description: __Height:__ 178cm __Ability:__ Discourse on Decadence Port Mafia's former exclusive informant. Works as an assistant counselor at the Special Ability Department at the Ministry of Internal Affairs. For the most part, Ango is a composed, calm young man, showing more restraint than Osamu Dazai and more discipline than Oda Sakunosuke. Although he values both as genuine friends, he strongly believes that Dazai needs someone to keep him from acting out as much as he does.

name: Appare Sorano
description: A 19-year-old man who grew up in a rural seaside town. He has been interested in machines since childhood, and has produced his own machines by hand. Though he is a genius mechanic, he has little interest in social interaction, considering machines as closer friends than other people. He often loses all track of time and surroundings once he starts tinkering, but abruptly falls asleep as if running out of batteries when he gets tired, which causes no end of consternation to Kosame.
